query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A person with short light-colored hair plays an electric guitar and sings into a microphone during a live musical performance. The subject wears a dark long-sleeved shirt and is positioned in left profile. Bright stage lighting illuminates the scene from the lower right, casting warm orange and yellow hues across the guitar body and strings. The microphone stands on a boom arm positioned at mouth level. The background is deeply shadowed, suggesting a small venue or club setting. The guitar has a sunburst or natural wood finish with visible hardware and pickups along the strings.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A musician with short light-colored hair performs live, captured with heavy motion blur that streaks their face, hands, and guitar into layered translucent trails, suggesting rapid movement during a long exposure. Their eyes are closed and mouth open at the microphone, conveying intensity or strain. The guitar and microphone bleed into ghosted duplicates, while blown-out orange stage lights flare across the lower frame. The chaotic, unsteady framing crops the subject tightly with tilted energy, amplifying the raw urgency of the performance. Deep shadows swallow the background, concentrating attention on the dissolving figure and their instrument.
